programme.title: Pool Kings: It's Tiki Time
programme.desc: The Pool Kings whip up a Tiki-themed, resort-style pool featuring a custom putting green for the entire family to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Perfect Time for a Pool and Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: A Houston, Texas, family is ready to make their dream pool a reality, so the Pool Kings accept the challenge to take this family's outdoor fun to the next level with a dynamic, resort-style pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Wildebeest and Waterfalls
programme.desc: Texas grandparents want a backyard and waterfall that is even more of an attraction for their grandkids than the exotic animals that live next door. The crew create an oversized fire pit, a dog-friendly Baja shelf and a boulder waterfall.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Vegas Jackpot Swimming Pool
programme.desc: A Las Vegas family hits the jackpot when Paul and Brian come to design the pool of their dreams. The guys are put to the test to turn the narrow desert yard into a world of water that includes splash pads, an outdoor kitchen and a pro volleyball net.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Modern Mountain Pool
programme.desc: A family enhances their spectacular mountain view with a breathtaking oversized pool featuring an infinity edge. An outdoor kitchen and firepit complete the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All About the View
programme.desc: Steve and Justin are determined to convert a couple's neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise, but hidden engineering issues make this build more complicated than it seems.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Things start heating up when Tyler Florence, Ted Allen, Ina Garten, The Neelys and others share their best ever hot and spicy dishes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Guilty Pleasures
programme.desc: On the menu is a 24 layer chocolate cake and succulent duck smothered in gravy and cheese.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Motor City's Mouthwatering Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon takes reality television star Kendra Wilkinson on a whirlwind food and beer tour of Detroit to introduce her to one of the country's most resurgent cities.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Triple Meat Trifecta
programme.desc: In Newport, R.I., Michael Symon dives into a triple meat-stacked sandwich with smoked pork belly, bologna and chicken liver pate. A decadent, ultra-crispy and deep-fried soft-shell crab patty in San Francisco will change the way you look at burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Family Feast
programme.desc: In Memphis, Michael Symon sits down with four generations of barbecue royalty for the scoop on their most delicious family secrets, with a side of smoked turkey and sweet potato fried pie.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Festivals
programme.desc: Join the party as Roger Mooking visits three of the greatest fire-roasted ragers that cook mountains of meat and keep the barbecue faithful lining up for more. He attends a church picnic with nearly four tons of meat and a crowd of 4,000 carnivores.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southern Sizzle and Smoke
programme.desc: At a non-profit organization to support veterans in Georgia, Roger Mooking helps cook a whole mutton and slow-roast veggies for a cookout. At Bob Sykes Bar-B-Q in Bessemer, AL, he loads 250 pounds of salted pork into a 15-foot pit.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay

programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: Disney Junior Ready for Preschool: Seasons
programme.desc: Summer and Animal enjoy all four seasons.

programme.title: Mira, Royal Detective: Mystery at the Puppet Show/ The Mystery of the New Kid

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Don't Rain on My Pug-rade/ Their Royal Pug-ness
programme.desc: When Bob can't leave his house to watch a parade, the pups enlist a family of ducks to march past the house. Bingo and Rolly head to England to learn how a queen is treated.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Big Sister Motsuki / PJ Party Crasher
programme.desc: Motsuki steals Romeo's Baby Beam and turns the PJ Masks into bad-behaved babies! Luna Girl takes her girl friends to the moon when she's not invited to a Pyjama Party.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Fun-tastical Field Day/ Clarabelle on the Mooo-ve!
programme.desc: During Fun-tastical Field Day, Donald tries to do all the competitions himself. The girls reunite for a race so that Clarabelle can try to become a Roadsterette!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Captain Rolly/ The Coolest Dogs in Town
programme.desc: Bob takes Bingo and Rolly to a 'Captain Dog!' event where the pugs get to be heroes for a day. The pups try to find ways to keep Bob cool on a hot summer day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Madness
programme.desc: Luna Girl steals the moon crystal to power up her Luna Fortress’ Mega-Magnet, which creates a portal that pulls stuff up from the city. The PJ Masks go off to the moon to stop her!

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Kitty/ Polly Wants a Pug
programme.desc: When Bob brings home a lost kitty, Bing and Rolly try find her a home. While in Florida, Bingo and Rolly search for an old friend of Bob's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Art for Pug's Sake/ Winter Wonder-Pug
programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Handy Helpers
programme.desc: When the Handy Helpers go limp, Mickey discovers the Clubhouse machine is broken.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Thinking Cap
programme.desc: When Clarabelle Cow plans a fun scavenger hunt for the Clubhouse pals, Professor Von Drake lets Goofy borrow his new invention to help everyone figure out the clues.

programme.title: Bluey: Keepy Uppy / Magic Xylophone / Shadowlands

programme.title: Bluey: The Sleepover / Hide and Seek / Camping
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo's cousin Muffin shows up for a sleepover; Bluey plays a game of hide and seek with Bingo; Bluey goes camping and meets Jean-Luc.

programme.desc: Goofy along with friends help a baby Red Bird build a birdhouse for him and his family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy in Training
programme.desc: Goofy finishes an obstacle course and gets a shiny medal after learning directional skills.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Fishy Story
programme.desc: Mickey and crew journey to a waterfall to find Daisy's pet goldfish.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Old McMickey Had a Farm/ Happy Lab Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang renovate a rundown farm! When the professor calls the Happy Helpers to watch his lab while he's away, they are given very important instructions!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.desc: Bob gets a flat tire on a road trip with the Pugs; The Pugs look for Bob's Moms' lost locket.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Rock-A-Bye Birdie/ The Fly-Along
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy must impress Captain Beakman when she joins them for a ride-a-long delivery. When Mimi the mockingbird sings K.C.'s lullaby she puts everyone at T.O.T.S. to sleep.

programme.desc: Mickey and his friends plan to surprise Donald with a waffle breakfast for his birthday. Minnie's nieces, Millie and Melody, visit the Happy Helpers office for the day.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Melody/PJ Robot Takes Control
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must wear ear-protecting helmets when Romeo writes a song that turns listeners into his servant. PJ Robot tries to turn Romeo's Flying Factory into a Flying Party!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness

programme.desc: Teaching Biblical principles and tackling a variety of topics. Social media is used to minister directly to its audience and encourages viewers to ask questions and send in prayer requests.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A magazine program featuring current events as seen from a Christian perspective, as well as testimonies of changed lives.

programme.title: Movie: Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: After finally catching a criminal known to use black magic, Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson close another successful case. However, when his killing spree continues, the legendary sleuths take up the hunt again.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The crazy adventures of the dysfunctional Simpson family are set against a backdrop of satire, cynicism and greed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Home Away From Homer
programme.desc: Flanders moves after Homer humiliates him, but neither man is pleased with his new neighbors. Jason Bateman has a cameo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: Bones: The Prisoner in the Pipe
programme.desc: The remains of an escaped convict are found in a residential sewer, but an examination of the sewer pipes indicates that the murder occurred within prison walls.

programme.title: Bones: The Bump in the Road
programme.desc: The Jeffersonian team identifies the remains of a discount shopper and 'extreme couponer' who was dragged along the road under an 18-wheeler.

programme.title: Bones: The Don't in the Do
programme.desc: When Bones feels uncomfortable in her post-baby body, Booth decides to do something special to boost her self-confidence.

programme.title: Movie: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: Mike Banning uncovers a plot to assassinate the leaders of the world during the Prime Minister's funeral in London.

programme.title: Movie: Limitless
programme.desc: After taking a top-secret drug, a writer discovers that he has the ability to use 100 percent of his brain.

programme.title: Movie: The Boy Next Door
programme.desc: A recently separated high school teacher has a brief romance with her son's teenaged friend. When she abruptly ends things, the young man reveals a sinister side, and is not prepared to let her go so easily.

programme.title: Castle: Undead Again
programme.desc: The team explores the bizarre subculture of the 'undead' in New York City when Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of a man whose killer appears to be a zombie.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Breaking Brig
programme.desc: The NCIS team investigates the crash of an armoured transport bus carrying Naval brig detainees after four prisoners escape, including a black market broker who is one of the country's biggest security threats. Meanwhile, Pride turns to Gibbs for help.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Recruits
programme.desc: After a Navy SEAL is found murdered in a sorority house, the team must determine if the motive pertained to one of his classified missions or collegiate foul play. Meanwhile, Pride's daughter, Laurel, pays the NCIS office a visit.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The team is given a 22-hour deadline after the murder investigation of a Chief Warrant Officer who specialized in counterintelligence reveals his wife had been kidnapped and is being held for ransom.

programme.title: Charmed: Rewitched
programme.desc: Billie jeopardizes the Charmed Ones' new lives when she uses her powers to save an innocent and is caught by Homeland Security. Meanwhile, Piper and Paige organize a speed dating night at P3 to get the club back on its financial feet.

programme.title: Charmed: Kill Billie: Vol. 1
programme.desc: While attempting to vanquish a demon, Billie is flooded with childhood flashbacks about her sister and she casts a spell to erase her fears. Paige turns to the Elders for help when she and her sisters are bombarded by the press.

programme.title: Charmed: The Lost Picture Show
programme.desc: When Paige's father asks for her help with his charge, J.D., a future Whitelighter, they discover a demon who is kidnapping people throughout time and holding them hostage in a photo collage. A magical marriage counsellor switches Piper and Leo's bodies.

programme.title: Charmed: Battle of the Hexes
programme.desc: Phoebe and Billie discover a belt that gives Billie superpowers and which turns the sexes against one another. Meanwhile, sparks fly between Paige and her new charge's parole officer, Henry, and Piper and Leo search for a band to play at the club.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Pride faces further backlash from the FBI when he helps former Navy Intelligence Analyst Elvis Bertrand, who is the lead suspect in a multiple homicide case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After a decorated petty officer is found dead inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the team to a kidnapping case of a petty officer who was last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The team must rescue one of their own after Sebastian is kidnapped while at a restaurant with his mother. While being held by his captors, he's forced to use his gaming skills in a prison break.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Course Correction
programme.desc: NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors. Also, Sonja and Lasalle interview candidates for the team's open agent position.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: One Good Man
programme.desc: The team reviews unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is found murdered weeks before his graduation. Also, a concerned Wade turns to Pride after her adopted son, Danny, announces his plan to enter the Navy.

programme.title: Bones: The Warrior in the Wuss
programme.desc: The corpse of a truck company employee is found in the middle of the woods. After the victim's son is questioned, Booth and Brennan visit his karate class in search of a motive.

programme.title: Bones: The Family in the Feud
programme.desc: When a corpse is found in the middle of the woods, the team links the victim to two families that have been feuding for almost a century.

programme.title: Movie: Man on Fire
programme.desc: A former CIA agent chases the kidnappers who took the young girl he was hired to protect.

programme.title: Movie: Taken
programme.desc: Agent Bryan Mills left the service to be closer to his daughter Kim. When she goes on a tour of France, she is kidnapped by human traffickers and Bryan does everything in his power to get her back.

programme.title: Movie: Rambo
programme.desc: In Thailand, a group of Christian aid workers recruit John Rambo to guide them up the Salween River to deliver medical supplies to the Karen tribe of neighbouring Burma (aka Myanmar).

programme.title: Movie: Total Recall
programme.desc: A man tries to piece together his identity after learning that his memories are false. He travels to Mars and becomes involved in a revolution to overthrow the corrupt Governor of the planet and liberate an alien artifact.

programme.title: Movie: Summer Villa

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: Blanche's gay brother Clayton, makes a visit to Miami with a surprise, he has found the right person to make a commitment to, but Blanche still can't get over Clayton's sexual orientation.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go
programme.desc: The girls find out that Rose's boyfriend is in a witness protection program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Totally against Dorothy and Stan's impending nuptials, Sophia vows to not let the ceremony go off. Meanwhile, Blanche begins interviewing for a new roommate since Dorothy is planning to move out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser
programme.desc: Wanting someone to watch after Sophia during the day, Dorothy gets Sophia a job under false pretenses. Meanwhile, Blanche and Rose are all excited about being hired as models for a Penny Saver.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Melodrama
programme.desc: Blanche wants to intensify her relationship with her infamous one-night-stand-man, Mel Bushman. Meanwhile, Rose tries her hand at TV reporting. Her assignment: a dog show.

programme.title: Frasier: Roz in the Doghouse
programme.desc: Bulldog asks Roz to become his producer, and she accepts despite Frasier's protests that Bulldog is only trying to seduce her.

programme.title: Frasier: Retirement Is Murder
programme.desc: Martin tries to solve an old murder case that he's been unable to close for years, which involves a prostitute, a cop and a monkey.

programme.title: Frasier: Fool Me Once, Shame on You, Fool Me Twice
programme.desc: Someone steals Frasier's briefcase, his dry-cleaning, his car, and his identity. Then the conniving man goes around Seattle impersonating him.

programme.title: Frasier: You Scratch My Book
programme.desc: Frasier agrees to write the introduction to a new book by a pretty psychologist. After reading the book, he realizes he can't endorse it, but he's too attracted to the author to turn her down.

programme.title: Frasier: The Show Where Sam Shows Up
programme.desc: Frasier's old friend from Boston, Sam Malone, turns up in Seattle to reminisce. Sam soon reveals that he was supposed to have gotten married the previous day, but couldn't go through with it, so Frasier sets out to solve his problems.

programme.title: Frasier: Daphne's Room
programme.desc: Daphne decides to move out of the Crane residence after Frasier continually invades her privacy. When she finds all the Crane men in her room, she decides to quit.

programme.title: Frasier: The Club
programme.desc: When Niles attempts to join a private club, they offer the membership to Frasier instead. The two brothers end up sabotaging each other's chances for acceptance into the Empire Club.

programme.title: Frasier: Someone to Watch Over Me
programme.desc: When Frasier is stalked by a fan, he seeks the services of a bodyguard to protect him.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Movie Offer
programme.desc: Lucy mistakes a talent scout for a masher and nearly ruins Ricky's chances at a career.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ricky's Screen Test
programme.desc: The cameras roll for Ricky's screen test, but when the moment arrives Lucy takes the cue.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy's Mother-in-Law
programme.desc: Lucy meets her Spanish-speaking mother-in-law for the first time.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Ethel's Birthday
programme.desc: Lucy helps pick out a birthday present for Ethel and gets into hot water.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Even Grandmas Get the Blues
programme.desc: While babysitting for her granddaughter, a man mistakes Blanche as being the baby's mother and Blanche does nothing to set him straight. Meanwhile, Sophia gets ready for the Festival of the Dancing Virgins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Witness
programme.desc: Rose has a new man, Carl, in her life but suddenly out of the blue Miles returns, still undercover in the Witness Protection Program.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: What a Difference a Date Makes
programme.desc: The man who stood Dorothy up for her senior prom contacts her and they make a date. After learning why he stood her up, Dorothy unleashes her wrath on the person at fault, Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love for Sale
programme.desc: The girls prepare for the Children's Hospital Bachelorette Auction and a reluctant Dorothy decides to participate. She is in for a quick surprise when Stan walks in and begins bidding.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: The deathbed confession of an ex-patient at Shady Pines means bad news for Sophia, since in her confession she stated that she and Sophia started the 1985 Shady Pines fire.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home
programme.desc: Sophia can't remember the events of the evening of the 1985 Shady Pines fire and decides to jump bail and go back to Sicily. With the threat of Sophia going to jail, the girls reminisce about good times they have spent together.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Guests include actor James Denton from the Hallmark Channel series, 'Good Witch' and 'Duck Dynasty' star Missy Robertson. Lifestyle expert Monica Hart cooks grilled shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Heart
programme.desc: A woman is doing everything she can to save her cupcake business. With the help of a handsome investment banker, her luck begins to turn around.

programme.title: Movie: Pearl in Paradise
programme.desc: Alex, a photographer for a travel magazine, and Colin, a best-selling author, team up to find an elusive Fijian pearl.

programme.title: Movie: My Summer Prince
programme.desc: When a prince finds himself in some hot water for his partying ways, the royal family hires a PR consultant. But when she falls ill, her assistant steps in to take control of the campaign and possibly the prince's heart.

programme.title: The Office: Double Date
programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Murder
programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: The Office: The Manager and the Salesman
programme.desc: Sabre's CEO visits and tells Michael and Jim that one of them must take a step down and go back to sales.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam's contractions begin but she and Jim are determined to wait it out as long as possible so they can have more time at the hospital. The office tries to distract Pam from the pain by entertaining her.

programme.title: The Office: The Delivery
programme.desc: Pam and Jim make a blunder after their baby's birth; Michael sets up Erin with Kevin.

programme.title: The Office: New Leads
programme.desc: When the sales staff lets Sabre's new 'sales is king' policy get to their heads, Michael hides their new, prized leads.

programme.title: The Office: Happy Hour
programme.desc: Michael gets kicked out of a bar while trying to impress one of Jim's friends.

programme.title: The Office: Secretary's Day
programme.desc: Andy pulls out all the stops to give Erin a memorable Secretary's Day, and Michael reluctantly agrees to take her out to lunch. While out, Michael accidentally reveals a secret about Andy and Angela's relationship.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: How It Really Happened
programme.desc: A deep look at some of the most notorious crimes and mysteries of our time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Common Thread
programme.desc: The year was 1984, and a serial killer was on the loose in Florida. Eight women had been found dead. At each crime scene, investigators found tiny red fibers, fibers they hoped would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Dirty Deed
programme.desc: Eileen and Derrick Severs disappeared from their home in the small village of Hambleton in Great Britain, and police found evidence which suggested foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Home Evasion
programme.desc: A husband finds his wife shot outside of their home and she mutters the name of her apparent assailant just before her death. It takes fingerprint comparison, handwriting analysis, ballistics, and DNA testing for the true killer to be revealed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Window Watcher
programme.desc: Evidence at the scene supported a woman's seemingly farfetched story that a man wearing only underwear and gloves broke into the house, stabbed her boyfriend to death, and raped and terrorized her for hours afterwards.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stranger in the Night
programme.desc: When his mother is found dead, a Delaware man tells a story so improbable that police don't believe it. While there's no evidence directly tying him to the crime, investigators are certain he knows more than he's saying, until forensic testing is done.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Filtered Out
programme.desc: When a teenage girl goes missing, no one knows if she ran away or if she was the victim of foul play. Everyone's worst fears are confirmed when a body is found at the bottom of an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Social Circle
programme.desc: Four young adults are brutally murdered in an affluent Texas neighbourhood, and the crime scene yields little evidence. The next door neighbours see two people in black walking nearby and their descriptions become a key element in solving the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Disrobed
programme.desc: A married couple was found shot to death in their suburban home. Investigators thought they had pin-pointed the killer and his motive until trash revealed the shocking truth and the true killer's identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers
programme.desc: These true-life mysteries will explore the criminal’s motive, the perceived betrayal and the obsession that led to the deadly act.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers
programme.desc: These true-life mysteries focus on stories of revenge and betrayal carried out by the people seemingly most-trusted by their victims. Explore how the victims and perpetrator met, the criminal's motive, the deepening relationship and the deadly act.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers
programme.desc: These true-life mysteries focus on stories of revenge and betrayal carried out by the people seemingly most-trusted by their victims. Explore how the victims and perpetrator met, the criminal's motive, the deepening relationship and the deadly act.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Texas
programme.desc: In Western Texas, Bear falls to earth from an upturned bi-plane, to lock horns with the parched Chihuahuan Desert; he traverses deep gorges, locates an oasis and takes on a diamond back rattlesnake.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Romania
programme.desc: Bear encounters steep ravines, cavernous underground water systems and comes face to face with a large adult brown bear.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Welcome to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Twelve ordinary people must figure out how to survive on an uninhabited island. with just a few tools and a day's supply of water.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Water Works
programme.desc: The islanders struggle with sleep deprivation and an insect infestation. Jack manages to wrestle a half-eaten iguana from a python, providing a much-needed meal. Desperation sets in as the group realizes their water source is running dry.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Lost World
programme.desc: In this special episode, two lucky fans are selected to take on a special 14-day survival challenge. A single mom and an optimistic novice try to survive the wild coast of South Africa.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Treasure Island With Bear Grylls: Water Works
programme.desc: The islanders struggle with sleep deprivation and an insect infestation. Jack manages to wrestle a half-eaten iguana from a python, providing a much-needed meal. Desperation sets in as the group realizes their water source is running dry.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ducking Mayan Predators
programme.desc: In Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered landscape, two fan survivalists are dropped on an island filled with snakes, jaguars, and a duck named Henry. In a haunted Mayan jungle, a painful injury tests the resolve of survivalists Leah and Caesar.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Uncensored All-Stars: No Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: A brutal windstorm punishes the survivalists. A falling out with Bulent leads Makani to banish herself and risk going it alone. Kate finds a new group and the desperate team goes on a hunt that could make or break their challenge.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Left Behind
programme.desc: Four weeks into the brutal 40-day Amazon challenge, a violent two-day storm descends on the jungle. Before it's over, one more survivalist will be gone, leaving another hanging by a tenuous thread.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: The Final Fight
programme.desc: After Russell's shocking decision to quit the Amazon challenge, the remaining survivalists struggle to regroup in time for a brutal two-day 15-mile water extraction journey. Electric eels, anaconda and caiman all pose threats in this jam-packed finale.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: The Bermuda Triangle Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates if one of the Bermuda Triangle's most infamous disappearances was part of a conspiracy by a secret agent at war with the United States, and using technology, experts reveal if it vanished for far stranger reasons.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub
programme.desc: A sunken Nazi submarine packed with toxic cargo is a ticking timebomb that could put the whole world at risk. Jeremy Wade reveals the sub's top-secret mission on the day it sank and how experts keep it from sparking a global catastrophe.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Deep: Curse of the Kraken
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade reveals the new deep-sea discoveries that might offer definitive proof of the infamous giant squid, and using this fresh evidence, experts investigate if this underwater monster is the legendary kraken.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Wrath of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: New evidence reveals if Attila the Hun was responsible for the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Forbidden City
programme.desc: For the first time, archaeologists use cutting-edge technology to discover what lies beneath China's Forbidden City, revealing the dark secrets of this mysterious mega-palace that have remained buried for nearly 600 years.

programme.title: Unearthed: Titanic: The Last Secrets
programme.desc: A cutting-edge investigation into the sinking of the Titanic reveals new discoveries that might finally explain the mysteries of her last moments, and experts get closer to a shocking secret: if there was a way to save almost everyone on board.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Easter Island
programme.desc: The mysterious statues of Easter Island were built by one of the world's strangest and most isolated civilizations, and today, new evidence reveals why they were built and what caused Easter Island's sudden downfall.

programme.title: Unearthed: Forbidden City of the Pharaohs
programme.desc: A mysterious city in ancient Egypt is the home of the Valley of the Kings and grand temples, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and if the god the pharaohs worshiped here helped them rise to power.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Shift Happens
programme.desc: As the miners look to find more valuable ground, Shawn must fight the sea's shifting tide, Ken strains his excavator arm when digging hard cobble, Kris tries his chances with a rookie diver, and new diver Brian saves Vernon's day.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Hips Don't Lie
programme.desc: Rhonda has bumps all over her head, including a horned growth that has her deeply concerned. Fred has a mysterious condition on his hands and has not been able to get answers from any doctors. Kevin has a huge lump protruding from his hip.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Popping Popeye
programme.desc: Lisa has a horn growing out of the back of her head and fears that it could be cancer. Victor has a bulbous lump on the middle of his chest. Chuck has a Popeye-shaped bump on his arm. Christian and Jonathan are teenage brothers with matching lumps.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Curious Case of the Pooting Cyst
programme.desc: Diane has thousands of tumors all over her body that she feels have ruined her life. Will worries his shoulder lump will be ripped open at work. Anthony's daughters force him to get a lump examined. Kal Elle detests her varicose veins.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Tumor Takeover
programme.desc: Matt has a skin condition that causes tumors to grow all over his body. Yamileth hasn't pursued her dreams because of the lump on her neck. Pat is covered with dark spots from her neck to her abdomen. Jennifer has a unicorn bump on her forehead.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Sleepless in Steatocystoma
programme.desc: Jen has substantial growths on her ears that cause her depression, pain, and vertigo. Juliet is under emotional distress because of the bumps all over her neck and chest. Gerald has a mysterious, kiwi-size lump on his middle finger.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The Incredible Shrinking Lipoma
programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.desc: Gerald is back to see Dr. Lee and a hand specialist about a huge, intrusive bump on his middle finger. Vinnie has a large, embarrassing birthmark on his neck. Leta has a lump on the back of her thigh.

programme.desc: Bailey confronts Lee about his behavior, while Timberlee makes plans to go back to her hometown. Diane goes on a blind double-date.

programme.title: My Little Life: Playing the Little Card
programme.desc: Diane sees a fertility specialist to find out whether or not she can have a child. Timberlee heads to her hometown to check out her options.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: Vacation: Impossible
programme.desc: As major construction begins on their house, Courtney and Eric decide to take their first family vacation with the sextuplets. But between baby and big boy meltdowns, they struggle to keep everyone happy at the same time.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: A Very Busby Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Busbys plan a very special Thanksgiving, but bad news for Mimi may throw the holiday into turmoil. When Adam and Danielle find out that Riley and Parker are moving up to a different classroom, Adam struggles with the idea of separating the quints.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: It's My Potty and I'll Cry If I Want To
programme.desc: The Busbys return to the world of potty training, determined to succeed this time. Blayke takes gymnastics lessons spends some one-on-one time with her parents. Mimi distances herself from the family, struggling with the loss of her house.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Homeless
programme.desc: Misty and Jonathan lost their home after Misty became pregnant. Now, the couple lives in a tent and struggle to find jobs and housing before the baby is born, or they risk losing custody of him.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Addicted
programme.desc: Now that Colette's pregnant, she believes that it's possibly riskier to go off the methadone during pregnancy, than to stay on it.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Morbidly Obese
programme.desc: A young girl is pregnant with her second child and has a BMI of over 50 percent.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have An Eating Disorder
programme.desc: A woman with an eating disorder turns to her husband and therapy during a pregnancy.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: A Drug Dealer
programme.desc: Trisha has spent her pregnancy behind bars for dealing and using drugs. Up for parole, she will soon discover if she will give birth in jail or have a chance to prove that she can conquer her addiction and be the mother her child needs.

programme.title: Pregnant Behind Bars: Welcome to County
programme.desc: Inmate Jamie, a mother of four, struggles to gain visitation rights, and Tanya requests house arrest to prepare for the birth of her son.

programme.title: Pregnant Behind Bars: Breaking the Cycle
programme.desc: Inmate Latoya struggles with the possibility of giving her baby up for adoption, while disruptive detainee Esther is sent to disciplinary segregation.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant
programme.desc: Explores the fascinating and utterly surprising phenomenon of women who were completely unaware that they were pregnant until they went into labour.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Help From Above
programme.desc: After a car accident leaves 25-year-old Erin with a broken pelvis, her doctors warn of the dangers of getting pregnant. So when she goes to the ER with pains, she is suddenly fighting for a life that is not just hers.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Home Alone
programme.desc: One night while her husband is away, Tiffany, diagnosed with PCOS, has abdominal pain she believes to be a rupturing cyst but is actually an infant she didn't know she was carrying.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Born In a Dorm Room
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old coed, Elizabeth wakes in the middle of the night with debilitating stomach cramps, she makes a shocking discovery. Will her 19-year-old roommate be able to save her baby from a dangerous complication?

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: The Wedding Gift
programme.desc: Jenna misses her period but a home pregnancy test is negative, so she thinks it's the stress of her upcoming wedding. A few months later, she delivers a baby girl while on the toilet.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Heckle and Hide
programme.desc: The guys ask strangers for a little help with big items at the grocery store, and give entrepreneurial tips to some unfortunate souls. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out at a little league softball game while posing as 'that dad.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Wrapper's Delight
programme.desc: The guys make a mockery of each other while acting as restaurant managers, sing along with strangers trying to name that (made up) tune. The loser gets wrapped up in a birthday surprise that definitely wasn't on his wish list.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Panty Raid
programme.desc: The guys massage beachgoers on the boardwalk, broadcast the news from Times Square, and get their kicks teaching a karate class.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: The guys search for imaginary places with a little help from strangers, pick their own poison in the park, and there's a surprise behind every door in the horrifying hunt for a house sitter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 4
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Show Party 3
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug

programme.desc: Little Italy is in the house when Naples-born Raffaele Ronca goes up against Italian expert Ken Vedrinski. Food Network veterans Anne Burrell and Scott Conant bring their expertise to the arena to get Bobby Flay beat.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: We're All Family Here

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Number One Baby
programme.desc: Food Network's Scott Conant and Cooking Channel's Laura Vitale are bringing their Italian flare to crush Bobby Flay's record. It's up to San Diego chef Nicolas Bour and Charleston, South Carolina's RJ Moody to make sure they are number one in the kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Clamming Up
programme.desc: Indian spice master Kiran Patnam and creative chef Jonathan Wu bring big city energy to the arena. It's up to Chopped judges Amanda Freitag and Geoffrey Zakarian to decide which contender has what it takes to slay the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grill Me

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Gives You Goosebumps

programme.desc: Geoffrey Zakarian and TV host Sara Haines have a lot to be thankful for at the table this year, and they've brought in Creole Chef Bernard Carmouche and meatball master Daniel Sharp to stuff Bobby Flay like a turkey.

programme.desc: A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet. Rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just keep their heads above water while veteran captains Andy Hillstrand and Sig Hansen charge straight into the heart of the tempest.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bite the Hand

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: New Blood, Old Wounds
programme.desc: Late into Opilio season, the fleet battles against mental and physical breakdown. After deliberately defying Sig, Captain Anderson has a shot at redemption. Captain Keith props up one ailing greenhorn after another. Wild Bill must decide on a medevac.

programme.desc: The Cornelia Marie hatches a scheme to watch the Seahawks play. An injured crewman jeopardizes Captain Keith Colburn's plan on the Wizard. The Cape Caution crew makes a near fatal error. The Time Bandit loses a Captain.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: I'm the Captain
programme.desc: The polar ice pack descends, threatening the end of season. Jake struggles to lead his crew in the worst of conditions. Sig attempts to offload his crab before saving his gear. Casey shows Josh what it means to be a Captain and Keith grinds to the finish.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: We Have Not Yet Begun to Fight
programme.desc: Polar ice descends and each Skipper must choose flight or fight. The Saga is in danger of sinking and Jake must act fast to save his crew. Josh takes a huge gamble against Casey's wishes and heads towards the ice. Sig and Johnathan race to rescue gear.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Five-Year Storm, Part 1
programme.desc: The most menacing storm of opilio season moves in on the fleet. A rogue wave terrorizes the Cape Caution, ripping steel and timber. The Wizard crew races to plug a gushing leak. The Saga, captained by Jake Anderson, is nearly capsized by a 40-foot wave.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Five-Year Storm, Part 2
programme.desc: A 600-mile-wide arctic storm continues to ravage the fleet. Rookie skippers Jake Anderson and Josh Harris struggle just keep their heads above water while veteran captains Andy Hillstrand and Sig Hansen charge straight into the heart of the tempest.

programme.desc: Polar ice descends and each Skipper must choose flight or fight. The Saga is in danger of sinking and Jake must act fast to save his crew. Josh takes a huge gamble against Casey's wishes and heads towards the ice. Sig and Johnathan race to rescue gear.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: I'm the Captain
programme.desc: The polar ice pack descends, threatening the end of season. Jake struggles to lead his crew in the worst of conditions. Sig attempts to offload his crab before saving his gear. Casey shows Josh what it means to be a Captain and Keith grinds to the finish.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Aliens of the Outback
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson explores some of Australia's alien-looking lizard species and learns about their bizarre features - evolutionary adaptations to the harsh outback. Then, the team is hot on the trail of the elusive spike-covered Thorny devil.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: To Catch a Monitor
programme.desc: Coyote and his crew venture through the Outback in search of two iconic monitor species. As he swims through the watery oasis, he strategically stalks the Marten’s water monitor in hopes of having a face-to-face encounter.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Night of the River Monsters
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson braves the winding rivers of Maleny, Australia, in search of a real river monster: the elusive and massive long-finned eel. Coyote also encounters a smiling Saw Shelled Turtle and gets a painful, bloody kiss from a Carpet Python.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Swarmed by Killer Bees
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson's dangerous past encounter with honey bees has lead him to join forces with bee conservationist, Chris Brinton. A stunt involving Peterson and 10,000 bees dispels misconceptions and reveals their passive nature.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Danube
programme.desc: The Danube's scenic route through ten European countries has made it a tourist magnet. Poachers, invasive species and engineering projects have made it one of the most endangered rivers on Earth. Jeremy investigates what can be done to save it.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Yangtze
programme.desc: China's Yangtze River is threatened by overfishing, industrial pollution and the loss of iconic monster fish. Jeremy journeys upstream to find out if there are any fish left, and meets the heroes fighting for the future of the river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Zambezi
programme.desc: Wild and unnavigable, Africa's Zambezi boasts the world's mightiest waterfall, heart-pounding rapids and man-eating crocs. From the upper reaches in Zambia to the delta in Mozambique, Jeremy investigates the threats to this mighty river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Ganges
programme.desc: India's mighty Ganges, a river revered by a billion Hindus as a living goddess, is in trouble. Jeremy Wade is on a 1,500-mile mission to investigate the problems first hand and discover what is being done to save this holy river.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Amazon
programme.desc: The Amazon is the mightiest of all the rivers, but it is also under immense pressure. Jeremy Wade traces the epic migration of the dorado catfish and discovers the issues putting this great river at risk from leaking pipelines to impassable dams.

programme.title: Jeremy Wade's Mighty Rivers: The Mississippi
programme.desc: The mighty Mississippi is threatened on several fronts: from alien invaders pushing out iconic native fish, to vast blooms of green algae strangling life from the river. Jeremy meets scientists, fishermen and leaders fighting to save the river.

programme.title: River Monsters: European Man-eater
programme.desc: The Wels Catfish is an aggressive predator of man-eating proportions.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Flesh Eaters
programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: A Higher Calling
programme.desc: A Canadian couple fell in love with the Bahamas, the people and culture during his appointment at a church in Nassau.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: This Is Not Los Angeles
programme.desc: A London-born woman searches for a private sanctuary away from her busy life in Los Angeles on Eleuthera.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Time to Hang Ten

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Newfound Freedom
programme.desc: A woman who discovered the Bahamas recently retired from counterintelligence, is newly single, and ready to start a new chapter and find a home that matches her newfound sense of freedom.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: From Traffic to Tranquility
programme.desc: A firefighter and his wife are looking for a Bahamian getaway on Long Island where they can escape the relentless traffic in Los Angeles. She has her heart set on a relaxing retreat, but he and the kids want to be close to the action and adventure.

programme.title: Bahamas Life: Turning a Picture into Reality

programme.title: Bahamas Life: All In

programme.title: Bahamas Life: An Exuma High

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco

programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Man in the Background
programme.desc: When two young girls arrive home from school ten days before Christmas to find their father dead, police are able to narrow down the timeline of the murder to an eight-minute window, just before the girls walked in the door.

programme.title: American Monster: Momma's Girl
programme.desc: Great-Grandfather Arthur Burney knows he's lucky to have such a large loving family. But when a dead body is discovered everyone becomes a suspect - and it'll take an unexpected tip-off to reveal the mastermind behind the murder.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: The Man in the Background

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Lovers

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Vulnerable

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover's Revenge

programme.title: Deadly Women: Insatiable Greed
programme.desc: It's a dangerous thing when women want money over love.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lethal Teens

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world their marriages seemed happy; however, behind closed doors, Joyce Chant, Amy Bosley and Michelle Michael wanted out. All they have to do is murder the father of their children.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Three's a Crowd

programme.title: Deadly Women: Deadly Possession
programme.desc: Three women, who were protective of the people they loved, took matters into their own hands when they felt threatened.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Fixation

programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Everything But the Trellis
programme.desc: After moving into a lovely Santa Barbara home, that once belonged to a master gardener, this family with little interest in gardening decides to get help. Mike and Jim turn a garden path into a swimming lane, and the flowerbed into a stylish pool house.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Backyard Water Park
programme.desc: Brian and Paul Porter double the fun by giving a family not one, but two new pools. From a 60-foot slide and a sunken spa to a lazy river, the family gets a backyard water park that everyone can enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Stakes Are High
programme.desc: A young family recently relocated to College Grove, TN and they desperately miss having a pool to enjoy. With a major elevation issue in their new backyard, Kyle and his team have a challenging build to tackle.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Rockin' Resort Pool
programme.desc: The Pool Kings go above and beyond to create a project that has space for everyone in a big family. It includes a 15-foot tall natural rock grotto, swim-up bar, sun shelf and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: It's About Time
programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sea It to Believe It!
programme.desc: Everyone loves to go to the beach, but this time Lucas is bringing the beach to your backyard!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Dream Mulligan
programme.desc: Lucas is tasked with a challenging project: repair and remodel an unusable pool for a famous golfing family. Puzzled as to how this pool was even built, Lucas creates an ocean-themed pool with fire features, an infinity edge and his first water couch.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sea It to Believe It!
