programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Heart of the Home
programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles the battered kitchen of her new property, an 1897 bungalow. She enlarges and modernizes the space while preserving traditional elements of a bungalow kitchen.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: How Suite It Is
programme.desc: Tamara Day transforms a bedroom as she continues renovating an 1897 bungalow. Knowing modern buyers expect a master suite, Tamara annexes a second room to enlarge the tiny closet and add a bathroom.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Building Bigger In Texas
programme.desc: Garth travels to the Lone Star State to build its first mega deck. Garth unifies a disjointed patio, doubling the floor space and quadrupling the covered living area. The $325,000 deck is finished with fire pits, a swim spa and a mesquite bar top.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Spacious Retreat With Artistic Details
programme.desc: The Mega team overhauls an ugly, exposed and downright dangerous deck disaster. They face challenging weather, rotting wood and even an infestation while transforming two separate and unusable spaces into a sprawling, year-round retreat.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Modern, Zen Oasis With A Rustic Escape
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team has to turn a sunroom, concrete patio, and dirt landing by the pond into one cohesive space. After tearing out the sunroom, they build a steel framed deck with a flat roof that's connected to the existing patio.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Triple Threat Deck With a Pool
programme.desc: The team builds their biggest and most expensive masterpiece over four months on a $750,000 budget. Big problems start after finishing the deck, when freezing temperatures put an indefinite hold on finishing the pool.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Family Affair
programme.desc: West Hills, CA, newlyweds are eager to buy their first home together. He's a second-generation real estate agent so they feel confident they have the skills to lock in the perfect house.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Beach Budget Blowout
programme.desc: A Manhattan Beach, California, family of five hopes to stay close to the beach while finding more space. Affordable homes in their dream location all require renovation.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gourmets of the Galaxy
programme.desc: The Iowa State Fair welcomes Noah Cappe with a trio of meaty masterpieces, but it's the double Dutch almond funnel that has everyone jumping with joy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Genuine Legends
programme.desc: We're celebrating eats and eateries that have withstood the test of time. From America's best pancakes to the ultimate doughnuts, find out which dishes make the cut and go down in history as true legends.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Brilliantly Baked
programme.desc: It's time to indulge in some of the best baked goods imaginable as Martha Stewart shows off a beautifully perfect brioche she can't get enough of in New York City.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Fryin' King
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Big Fresno Fair in California for the debut of some new fair foods, including the Flamin' Hot Chimichanga and Rainbow Shrimp Fries.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Attack of the Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives at the Kentucky State Fair and gets a satisfying taste of all things Southern. He starts off with the Mac Ball Burger featuring deep-fried homemade mac and cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bayou Bites
programme.desc: Down in Texas and Louisiana, the bayou fairgrounds are full of rich and tasty food.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Winner, Winner, Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: Heading back to his Southern roots, Eddie Jackson is on the hunt for the best chicken dinners. Taking comfort food to the next level, these favorite dishes are trashy, messy and spicy. Winner, winner, it's chicken for dinner!

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Endless Pasta-bilities
programme.desc: There's something about pasta that's exciting, and Eddie Jackson shares a combination of savory sauces and a variety of textures for this ever-evolving ancient dish. No matter what, pasta has endless pasta-bilities!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Baby Bump
programme.desc: When Mike and Molly realize Frannie doesn't have a plan in place for after the baby is born, Molly decides to help by reuniting her with her estranged sister, Maura.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Open Mike Night
programme.desc: A confident Molly offers her wisdom to Samuel who now wants to be a stand-up comic. Meanwhile, Molly's advice to Harry causes him to challenge his protective mother.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Elfie
programme.desc: In the spirit of Christmas, the sometimes self-absorbed Mandy plays Santa by anonymously arranging a holiday surprise for Blanca, the Baxters' housekeeper. Also, when Vanessa gives Boyd a 'magical' elf doll, Ryan wants to tell Boyd it is just a doll.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: All About Eve
programme.desc: Eve has posted one of Mike's politically charged vlogs on her Facebook page, but ignores the kids at school when they start giving her a hard time for her views. Vanessa worries that Eve may become an outcast for this.

programme.title: Black-ish: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: The twins opt out of the family Halloween costume for fear it will hurt their social status in middle school. Dre and Bow take it upon themselves to protect them from bullies by putting together the best haunted house and invite the whole seventh grade.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with a fellow incoming freshman, Miriam, after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Burden of Truth: Crisis of Faith
programme.desc: With more potential cases of wrongful child apprehensions, Joanna and Billy investigate Millwood Family Services and discover a potential error in the custody hearing evidence that will change everything in the case and in their lives.

programme.title: In the Dark: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Murphy and Felix swing for the fences when they attempt to execute their plan to end their arrangement with Nia. Dean seeks the help of a former colleague. Max does the unthinkable.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Trip
programme.desc: Jerry is booked to appear on 'The Tonight Show' and takes George with him to Los Angeles.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Soup Nazi
programme.desc: George's request for extra bread causes the Soup Nazi to ban him from the restaurant.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Tazed in the Lady Nuts
programme.desc: Walden joins his beautiful former employee on a brilliant new project. Meanwhile, Alan advises Jenny to open up to her girlfriend or risk losing her.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Bill/ Murray
programme.desc: As Erica works on her application to Julliard, Adam and Beverly think she needs to do something big to stand out, so they decide to create a music video starring Erica. However, the music video does not go as Adam planned.

programme.title: Mom: Toilet Wine and the Earl of Sandwich
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie help Regina tie up loose ends on the way to drop her off at prison. Meanwhile, Alvin spends the day getting to know his grandkids.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the ATM
programme.desc: Max decides to break-up with Deke now that she knows about his wealthy background.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: A Very Special Episode
programme.desc: In hopes of spicing up their marriage, Melanie prepares a sexy surprise for Derwin. Meanwhile, Malik decides to clean up his life, but discovers some mistakes can't be fixed.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Williams vs. Keeton
programme.desc: A woman accuses her spiritual husband of cheating on the job and is surprised when not one, but two of his co-workers are called upon to testify.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Family and Funerals/ Slam Dunk
programme.desc: Nephew blames aunt for additional funeral expenses; A camera is damaged on a basketball court.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Bad Booth Behaviour/ Family Heirlooms
programme.desc: A man claims a fellow barber bad-mouthed him and stole his clients; a woman claims her late grandmother’s photograph was used without compensation.

programme.title: Ask Dr. LaViola
programme.desc: Dr. Jamie LaViola discusses how improvements to your smile can make a big difference. Don't let your fear of the dentist, or being too busy, keep you away from the smile you've always wanted.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Phillips vs. Polk
programme.desc: A woman on a revenge mission ends up catching feelings for the man she claims fathered her one-month-old daughter.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Renter's Regret/ Road Rage Went Viral
programme.desc: Disruptive neighbors and unpaid rent; a woman is fired after a road rage video goes viral.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Mom vs. Fiancée
programme.desc: Chris is tired of his mother Myssi and his fiancée Alexis constantly arguing with one another. Alexis believes that Myssi is trying to sabotage their relationship.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A father has had a strained relationship with his adult daughter since he slapped her in the face when she was 16. He’s suing her for the cost of a car towing bill and key. She is countersuing him for a refund for the car.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Not Caring For His Tree ', 'Backing Out ' and ' Conning A Cousin.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Being A Mean Mom' and ' Taking A Guy For A Ride.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: He's Too Heavy, He's My Brother/ Table Top Drunk
programme.desc: Man sues brother for improper training; man sues son for property damage after incident.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A nephew loaned money to his Uncle who refuses to make good on the loan. Then, plaintiff loaned a car to the defendant who made excuses not to pay.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did My Friend Steal My Money While I Was in a Coma?
programme.desc: Joseph called the show because he believes that his friend Chloe stole $900 from him. To make matters worse, he believes she did it while he was hospitalized.

programme.title: Maury: Father's Day DNA ... Please Prove This Is My Baby!
programme.desc: High school sweethearts Jasmine and Karl are hoping to prove to Karl's mother, Wanda, that Karl is the father of Jasmine's child. April needs to prove to her Ian's cousin, Tamika, that he is the father of both of April's children.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: It's Raining Trannies
programme.desc: Get ready for gender-bending action on today's Jerry Springer. Brook is here to finally reveal to her boyfriend that she wasn't born a woman. Plus, Jbaby is here to reveal to his girlfriend Cece that he is really a she.

programme.title: Maury
programme.desc: Maury Povich explores compelling issues that impact society as a whole, and digs deep to get to the heart of the matter.

programme.title: Movie: Something Borrowed
programme.desc: After a night of drinking, a woman sleeps with her best friend's fiancé and falls in love with him.

programme.title: Movie: The Kitchen
programme.desc: A group of gangsters are locked up and their wives continue the running of their illicit enterprises in 1970s Hell's Kitchen.

programme.title: Movie: La La Land
programme.desc: An aspiring actress meets a poor jazz pianist in Los Angeles and they fall in love. As they both work towards their dreams, they become each other's supports. They begin to have success, but find that the dreams they worked for could tear them apart.

programme.title: Movie: Jersey Girl
programme.desc: A young father loses his career and his wife and must raise his daughter alone the best way that he can.

programme.title: Movie: Greenberg
programme.desc: A 40-year-old carpenter from New York goes to Los Angeles to house sit for his brother and his family. He develops a relationship with his brother's assistant while she helps him with the house and the family dog.

programme.title: Movie: John Tucker Must Die
programme.desc: A group of girls team up to get revenge on a boy who was sneaking around on all of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampett family strikes oil in the Ozark swamps, they move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Movie: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: A man cares for an unusual man-eating plant that brings him fame and good fortune.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Pete Holmes: Dirty Clean
programme.desc: Taped at the Aladdin Theatre in Portland, Oregon, Pete Holmes' latest comedy hour has him confronting personal truths around the mechanisms of consciousness, Michael Jackson, the afterlife, Elon Musk and being a new dad.

programme.title: Movie: Heart and Souls
programme.desc: A man is possessed by four souls who instruct him to continue their unfinished business.

programme.title: Movie: Almost Heroes
programme.desc: Two 19th-century explorers attempt to reach the Pacific Ocean before Lewis and Clark.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Movie: Paul
programme.desc: Two British comic book geeks traveling across the United States encounter aliens outside of Area 51.
